air-fryer-cheese-stuffed-mini-italian-me.name: Air Fryer Cheese-stuffed Mini Italian Meatloaves
instructions: Combine milk, pesto, egg, garlic, and pepper in a medium bowl. Add ground beef and bread crumbs and combine, being careful not to overmix.

Divide meat mixture into 4 portions. Press a well into each portion, leaving a 1/2-inch border around the edge. Place 2 slices pepperoni into each well, overlapping to cover the length of the well. Top each with 1/4 of the mozzarella balls. Press meat mixture around the filling to enclose; form each portion into an oblong loaf shape. Place loaves into the air fryer basket, in batches.

Cook in the air fryer at 188°C (190 degrees C) until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest portion of the meat reads 74°C (75 degrees C), about 15 minutes. Serve meatloaves topped with warm marinara sauce and fresh basil.

air-fryer-greek-frittata.name: Air Fryer Greek Frittata

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a 6-inch cake pan with nonstick spray.

Whisk eggs and cream together in a bowl. Stir in spinach, feta cheese, cherry tomatoes, onion, oregano, salt, and pepper until well combined. Pour into the prepared cake pan and cover tightly with foil.
Air-fry for 12 minutes. Remove foil and air-fry until top starts to brown and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, 4 to 8 minutes longer.

ajoarriero-cod-traditional-recipe-pequer.name: Ajoarriero Cod (traditional Recipe)

ingredients.item: 1 cucharada de carne de pimiento choricero

instructions: Ponemos en la cazuela el aceite de oliva virgen extra y pochamos las cebollas a fuego suave.
We added the crushed garlic to the mortar, the padded tomato and fry.
Once I have fried everything, we add picket pits cut into strips and choricero pits, we cook a few minutes.
We integrate desalted and cut cod into small pieces (you can wear crumbs), we mix and cook a few minutes.
The cod will be made soon. Ready this Ag Cod to serve and enjoy.

alentejo-pine-teleculinaria.name: Alentejo Pine
instructions: Spread the pine nuts on a tray and roast them in the oven, preheated to 180oC. Remove and reserve.
Light a pot with the honey and let it boil until it thickens. Add the pine nuts, stir and remove from the fire.
Deite o preparado sobre uma folha de papel vegetal siliconizado. Cubra com outra folha e passe por cima o rolo da massa para alisar e ficar mais fino.
Take off the top sheet and let it dry a little. Then take off the bottom sheet, then cut into pieces and let it dry completely overnight. Serve right away.

alexander-mccream-spiced-pumpkin-ice-cre.name: Alexander Mccream Spiced Pumpkin Ice Cream

ingredients.item: Plus 1 tablespoon superfine or granulated sugar

instructions: 1. Pour the milk and cream into a large saucepan and heat gently, stirring occasionally, until the mixture begins to steam but not boil.

2. Meanwhile, whisk the egg yolks in a heatproof bowl until smooth. Add 1/3 cup of the sugar and whisk until pale and slightly fluffy. Gradually and slowly, pour the hot milk into the egg mixture while whisking continuously to prevent the eggs from scrambling. Return the mixture to the saucepan and place over low heat, stirring frequently, until the custard thinly coats the back of a wooden spoon. Do not let boil.

3. Pour back into the bowl and set aside for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until cooled to room temperature. For more rapid chilling, fill a sink halfway with cold water and ice and place the bowl of mixture in it for 20 minutes. Never put the hot mixture into the refrigerator.

4. Put the pumpkin, cinnamon, vanilla extract, remaining sugar, and a dash of rum, if using, into a blender or food processor and blend until smooth. Add to the chilled custard and whisk well. Pour the mixture into an ice cream machine and churn according to the manufacturer's instructions.

5. When the churning is completed, use a spoon or spatula to scrape the ice cream into a freezer-proof container with a lid. Freeze until it reaches the correct scooping texture (at least 2 hours). Dust each portion with a little ground cinnamon before serving.

ali-pasha-pilaf-lezzet.name: Ali Pasha Pilaf
instructions: 1. To prepare the meat of meatballs; soak bread and drink it, repel onion.
2. A deep roughing and kneading by adding bread, onion, salt and pepper.
3. Handle and roll the nuts size parts.
4. Patlıcans are cut off and crack cube.
5. Wait in salty water to remove the pain, dry and dry it.
6. Girl in the liquid pan and fry eggplants after meatballs.
7. Take over paper towel and pull out excess fat.

16. Take it out of fire and leave it to be brewed with paper towel.
17. September Decorate and serve with a fine chopped deck.
18. Rices can still add hot water up to 1 coffee cup while rice is still on.

alicante-nougat-recipe-comedera.name: Alicante Nougat Recipe
instructions: You have the almonds in a frying pan till they are slightly golden. Reserve.
Vierte la miel en una olla y lleva al fuego.
Cooking at medium heat - low till honey gets fraked and more liquid.
Incorporate sugar and mix very well until dissolved.
Cocina a fuego bajo hasta que se forme una mezcla ligera, similar a la un caramelo.
Apaga y deja reposar 1 minuto.
Bat the egg clear to snow and add to the earlier mixture.
Mix well till everything's perfectly integrated.
Agrega las almendras y mezcla.
Forra un molde rectangular con papel antiadherente y coloca una oblea.
Fold the turret and cover with the second oblet.
Let rest for at least 6 hours.
Pasado este tiempo, debe estar compacto. Desmolda con cuidado y corta en porciones.

almond-butter-cups.name: Almond Butter Cups
instructions: First, line a mini-cupcake tin with paper liners.
Next, melt chocolate chips in a microwave-safe bowl.
Then, mix the powdered sugar and almond butter together for a thick consistency.
Once the chocolate chips are melted, place a thin layer of chocolate on each liner. Then, add a spoonful of the almond butter concoction on top of each layer of chocolate.
Top with another layer of chocolate, completely concealing the almond butter.
Finally, place the tray in the freezer and freeze for 1.5 hours.
Serve and enjoy!

almond-oat-lace-cookies.name: Almond-oat Lace Cookies

ingredients.item: Whole natural unsalted almonds with skins

instructions: Arrange racks in lower and upper thirds of oven; preheat to 350°. Line 2 rimless baking sheets with parchment paper. Pulse almonds and oats in a food processor until coarase meal forms. Set aside.

Melt butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add both sugars and honey; whisk until blended and sugar dissolves, 1–2 minutes. Remove from heat. Add nut mixture, flour, and salt; stir until well blended.

Spoon batter by 2-teaspoon portions onto baking sheets, spacing 2 1/2" apart. Using your fingertips, pat cookies down to 1/4"-high rounds; push in any jagged edges to form smooth circles. Bake, rotating sheets after 6 minutes, until dark golden brown and cookies spread out into a thin layer, 10-–12 minutes. Slide cookies on parchment onto a wire rack and let cool.

Using a pastry brush, brush half of each cookie with melted chocolate. Let stand until the chocolate is set, about 2 hours. DO AHEAD: Can be made 2 days ahead. Store airtight in between sheets of parchment or waxed paper.

amatriciana-pasta-pequerecetas.name: Amatriciana Pasta

ingredients.item: 100 g de queso pecorino romano rallado
Una cucharada de aceite de oliva

instructions: It starts by cutting the guantiale into strips or cubes about 1 cm thick. Warm up a large frying pan with medium heat and add a tablespoon of olive oil. Once the oil's hot, add the guanciale strips. Fry the guanciale, stirring occasionally, till the strips become golden and crispy. That procedure usually takes about 5 to 8 minutes, depending on the thickness of the strips. It's important to avoid hastening at this step. The goal is to cook the guanciale slowly so that its fat will melt and glow without burning. During this process, you will notice that the guanciale drops some of its fat. That fat is rich in flavour and will serve as a basis for salsa.

Once the guanciale is golden and crispy, it incorporates the minced red chili into the frying pan. The amount of chili will depend on your choice for an octopus. A little can add a pleasant heat to the plate but feel free to put up with your taste. Then add the peeled tomatoes. If the tomatoes are whole, you can slightly crush them with a fork or a machador. That will help them better blend with the guanciale and chili and cook more evenly. Revolves well all the ingredients in the frying pan to integrate them. It reduces fire to low and allows the salsa to cook slowly about 20 minutes. It's important to leave the salsa out of care, sometimes stirring so that it doesn't stick in the frying pan. While the salsa is cooked, you can use it to get the dough and other plate elements ready.

Fill a big pot with water and get it to a boil. Do not spare with the size of the pot. The dough needs space to move and cook uniformly. Add one or two tablespoons of salt to boiling water. Once the water's boiling, add the spaghetti. Follow the package's instructions to cook them till they are "to the dente." That means they have to be cooked but still put up with a bite. The exact cooking will vary with the mark and thickness of the spaghetti but will usually be about 8 to 12 minutes. It sometimes removes to prevent the dough from pounding between them.

When the dough's ready, scrape it but don't forget to save some of the cooking water, which can be useful to adjust the consistency of the sauce if necessary. Take the stuffed spaghetti directly to the frying pan with the sauce. That technique is key to Italian cuisine: to mix with salsa in frying pan allows pasta to absorb flavors more effectively. Gently mix the spaghetti with the salsa and make sure that it's well impregnated. If the salsa looks too thick, you can add some of the cooking water reserved to achieve the desired consistency. It cooks everything together for a few more minutes, so that flavors come together perfectly.

Serves the dough up and down with some hot, hot plates. The Fairy Fairy Fairy and Fairy Fairy cheese widely sprinkle. In so doing, the cheese will melt slightly, creating an additional flavored cape that enriches the plate. A good quantity of pecorino cheese is vital to achieve that characteristic flavour from true spaghetti to amatricians.

anas-ny-bialys.name: Ana's Ny Bialys

ingredients.item: Warm water (110 degrees f (43 degrees c))

instructions: Preheat oven to 93°C (95 degrees C). Turn off and keep door closed to retain warmth.
Dissolve yeast and sugar in 1/2 cup warm water in a large bowl. Let stand until yeast softens and begins to form a creamy foam, 7 to 12 minutes.

Mix all-purpose flour, bread flour, vital wheat gluten, and 2 1/2 teaspoons salt in another bowl; add to yeast mixture. Combine remaining 1 1/4 cup warm water with onion juice; pour over flour and yeast mixture. Stir together until a dough forms.

Knead dough on a floured work surface until soft and smooth, 8 to 10 minutes. Form dough into a ball and place it in a lightly-oiled glass or ceramic bowl, turning to oil all sides. Cover with a towel. Place dough in warm oven until it triples in bulk, about 1 1/2 hours.
Punch dough down and turn it over. Cover with plastic wrap and let rise in the oven again until doubled in bulk, about 45 minutes more.
Punch dough down again and transfer to a floured work surface. Divide into 2 equal cylinders. Slice each cylinder into 8 rounds. Lay them flat and let rest, covered with a towel, about 10 minutes.

Heat oil in large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and cook, stirring often, until golden, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat; stir in poppy seeds and 1/2 teaspoon salt. Let filling cool to room temperature.

Flatten the dough into rounds about 3 1/2-inches in diameter with a raised middle and thinner edge. Sprinkle cornmeal lightly over 2 baking sheets. Arrange dough rounds on baking sheets. Cover with plastic wrap and let rise until increased by half, about 30 minutes.
Center oven rack and preheat oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).

Press the bottom of a greased shot glass in the center of each round to make a deep indentation. Place 1 to 2 teaspoons of filling in each indentation. Cover with plastic wrap and let bialys rise until puffy but not doubled, about 15 minutes.
Bake bialys in the preheated oven until lightly browned, rotating the baking sheets so they brown evenly, about 15 minutes.

anchovy-with-fresh-herbs-lezzet.name: Anchovy With Fresh Herbs
instructions: 1. Wash and dry the head parts of the dough with the towel paper after cleaning them.
2. Add greens, red pepper, lemon juice, grated lemon peel, egg white, salt and pepper.
3. To a furnace container that you lubricate the raw materials you have taken, half of the inner parts in a row.
4. Taste with salt and pepper and broadcast on fresh grass mortar.
5. Close the remaining raws onto the grassed mortar.
6. Very little olive oil on it and cook for 35-40 minutes in the oven heated in advance.
7. Take the oven and serve hot.

and-tomato-soup-recipe-comedera.name: And Tomato Soup Recipe
and-tomato-soup-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de sopa de tomate fácil y rápida
instructions: Fill a pot with water and put the tomatoes to boil for 1 minute, get them out and put them in cold water. That's how you can get their skin out easy.
Once without skin, pits tomatoes into small cubes and reserve.
Peel the onion, pepper and garlic very small and sock them in a frying pan with olive oil. Cook them till onion and garlic are golden, but care that they will not be burned.
Add the chopped tomatoes, the bay leaf and a pint of salt and pepper. Add 2 glasses of water or, if you prefer, you can use vegetable stock.
Put the fire down in half and let it boil for 30 minutes. Check every once in a while and check his salt.
After this time you can do 2 things: leave tomato soup as it stands, with pieces of vegetables, or liquefied. If you choose to liquefied it, get his bay leaf first.
Once liquefied, you'll have your delicious and easy tomato soup ready.

and-vegan-pumpkin-cake-comedera.name: And Vegan Pumpkin Cake
and-vegan-pumpkin-cake-comedera.original_name: Bizcocho de calabaza vegano casero y fácil

ingredients.item: 250 g pumpkin purée cooked and drained
100 g de chispas de chocolate negro (vegano)
Aceite o papel de horno para el molde

instructions: The oven will be pressurized at 180 ″ 3 ″ and a mold or form with an oven paper will be fat and the edges will be pitted to facilitate the pounding.
Triple pumpkin till you get a fine and steamed purée. If it's very aqueous, scrape it slightly with a paddle to prevent the biscuit from getting heavy.
In a large bowl, mix pumpkin purée with oil, sugar and vanilla until the whole is homogenous.
Add vinegar or lemon juice and mix briefly. It doesn't have a taste but helps to activate bicarbonate during baking.
It incorporates chewed flour, bicarbonate, salt and cinnamon. Mixture with spatula, without beating, only to integrate. The mass should be thick but smooth.
Add the chocolate and mix sparks with softness and distribute them without more work.
Vierte la mezcla en el molde, alisa la superficie y golpea ligeramente el molde contra la encimera para eliminar burbujas grandes.
Hornea durante unos 45 minutos, o hasta que al pinchar con un palillo salga limpio o con migas secas. Deja reposar 10 minutos antes de desmoldar y pasar a una rejilla.

apple-cake-with-walnuts-teleculinaria.name: Apple Cake With Walnuts

ingredients.item: 100 g  miolo de noz + miolo de noz q.b.

instructions: Fit a form with margarine and start the oven at 180 degrees. In a bowl, beat the margarine well with sugar. Then add the eggs, without stopping beating. Add the yeast and flour, beat well, and finally add the warm milk, slowly beating until you get a smooth cream.
Peel 1 apple and 1/2, eliminate the pit and cut them into small cubes. Add to the previous preparation as well as 100 g of roughly broken nut kernel, wrap and lie down in shape.

Remove the shell and lump from the remaining apple, slice it into slices and dispose of them on the surface of the dough. Sprinkle with more nuts and cinnamon powder, if you like, and bring it to the oven, preheated to 180°C, for about 30 to 35 minutes. Take it off, peel it off and let it cool.

apple-calzone-teleculinaria.name: Apple Calzone
instructions: The dough: in a bowl beat the sugar with the butter, add a pinch of salt, the flour, a few drops of water and the lemon scrape, knead well and let it rest for 25 minutes.
The stuffing: peel the apples and cut them into pieces. Take a frying pan with the butter to the fire, add the sugar and let it melt.
Gather the pieces of apple, stirring until the apples soften.

Add the sultans, stir and let it cool. Sprinkle a large pie form with flour. Extend the dough and line the tart. Lay out the apple filling in half the shape, without reaching the edges and brush them with beaten egg. Fold the other half of the dough over the filling and close it in half-moon shape. Brush with the egg beaten over and sprinkle with sugar. Take the preheated oven to 180°C for 35 minutes. Then remove, serve hot and with ice cream to accompany.

apple-walnut-ginger-galette.name: Apple-walnut-ginger Galette

ingredients.item: Trans-fat-free piecrust (such as whole foods' or homemade

instructions: Heat oven to 204°C. In a bowl, toss apples with walnuts, ginger, 2 tablespoons sugar, flour and cinnamon. Roll pie crust into a 12-inch circle, about 1/8-inch thick. Coat a baking sheet with cooking spray; place pie crust on sheet. (It's OK if the pie crust hangs over the sides.) Arrange apple slices in one layer to form a circle about 3 inches from edge of pie crust; fill in circle with more slices. Scrape any remaining walnuts and ginger from bowl onto apples. Gently fold edges of pie crust over outer edge of apple filling to form a thick crust. Spray outer rim of crust with cooking spray; sprinkle crust with remaining 2 teaspoons sugar. Bake until crust is golden brown and apples are soft, 35 minutes. Cut into 8 slices and serve.

artichoke-and-feta-tarts.name: Artichoke And Feta Tarts

ingredients.item: -ounce (1 sheet) or 17.3-ounce (2 sheets) package frozen puff pastry

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Blend cream and 2 ounces feta in a food processor until smooth; season with salt and pepper.

If using 14-ounce package of puff pastry, cut in half and roll out each half on a lightly floured surface into a 16x10-inch rectangle. (If using 17.3-ounce package, use 1 sheet of pastry for each tart.) Transfer each piece of pastry to a parchment-lined baking sheet. Using a paring knife, lightly score pastry (do not cut all the way through), leaving a 1-inch border.

Spread feta mixture over pastry, dividing evenly and staying within border. Arrange artichoke hearts over feta mixture and crumble remaining 2 ounces feta over; drizzle with oil. Brush pastry border with egg.

Bake tart until pastry is puffed and beginning to brown, 10-15 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 375° and continue to bake until pastry is deep golden brown and cooked through, 20-25 minutes longer. Serve warm or at room temperature.
DO AHEAD: Tart can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.

ashleis-smoked-trout-dip.name: Ashlei's Smoked Trout Dip
instructions: Stir trout, cream cheese, sour cream, Worcestershire sauce, green onion, garlic powder, paprika, lemon juice, horseradish, cayenne pepper, and black pepper together in a bowl until well blended. Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes before serving.

authentic-german-potato-salad.name: Authentic German Potato Salad
instructions: Place potatoes in a large pot and add water to cover by at least 1 to 2 inches; bring to a boil. Cook until potatoes are easily pierced with a fork, about 10 minutes. Drain, and set aside to cool.

While the potatoes are cooking, place bacon in a large, deep skillet over medium-high heat. Fry until browned and crisp, 10 to 12 minutes, turning as needed. Transfer bacon to a paper towel-lined plate and crumble when cool enough to handle. Leave bacon grease in the skillet.
Cook onion in the bacon grease over medium heat until browned, 6 to 8 minutes. Add vinegar, sugar, water, salt, and pepper to the pan and bring to a boil.
Once boiling, add potatoes, and 1/2 of the crumbled bacon. Cook until heated through, 3 to 4 minutes.
Transfer warm potato salad to a serving dish and sprinkle remaining crumbled bacon over top. Garnish with parsley and serve warm.

ayval-colaf-lezzet.name: AaUppercase
instructions: 1. Peel the shells of the moon and remove the beans and chop them in the form of cube.
2. Add dust sugar on the pot and cook it in order to stay in the jealous fire.
3. Take the pot from the stove and sprinkle the turf on the floors and leave it cool.
4. Share and add pine peanuts on four serving glasses.
